src/main/java/org/cyberwarriors/domain/J.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/org/cyberwarriors/domain/J.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial, the compiler may warn or error depending on configuration, and it is required for correct semantic marking of serialization metadata in modern Java.

src/main/java/org/cyberwarriors/service/.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/org/cyberwarriors/service/.why_exists: Java 21 enables strict serialization checks by default; without @Serial, the compiler may warn or error depending on configuration, and it is required for correct serialization metadata in modern Java.

src/main/java/org/cyberwarriors/service/.general_idea: Import java.io.Serial to support the @Serial annotation.
src/main/java/org/cyberwarriors/service/.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is in java.io package; without the import, the code will not compile.

src/main/java/org/cyberwarriors/service/.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/org/cyberwarriors/service/.why_exists: Java 21 enables strong encapsulation of the internal API java.io.ObjectStreamClass; without @Serial, the compiler may warn or fail depending on configuration, and it is required for proper serialization metadata handling in modern JDKs.

src/main/java/org/cyberwarriors/service/.general_idea: Import java.io.Serial to support the new annotation on serialVersionUID.
src/main/java/org/cyberwarriors/service/.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is part of java.io package and must be imported to compile.

src/main/java/org/cyberwarriors/web/rest.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/org/cyberwarriors/web/rest.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial on serialVersionUID, the code may fail to compile with --enable-preview or strict linting tools enforcing the new serialization API.

src/main/java/org/cyberwarriors/web/rest.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/org/cyberwarriors/web/rest.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is not available without importing java.io.Serial, causing a compilation error.

src/main/java/org/cyberwarriors/web/rest.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/org/cyberwarriors/web/rest.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is part of java.io in Java 21; without the import, the code will not compile.
